texto: For all the excitement and adventure and really wild things going on, the danger was always very real. Ferdy was real. He really died. There's a cost, when you wish for things there's always a cost. You have to make sure it's a price you're willing to pay. And life is the highest price of all.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Justin Richards sobre sentido da existência e experiência vivida. A afirmação “For all the excitement and adventure and really wild things going on, the danger was always very …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a vida, wish, really, útil em momentos de wish.
